name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN in Las Vegas offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold and firearm buying, and resale of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a retail pawn chain operating a Las Vegas location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in the 89104 zip code. Part of a larger family of EZPAWN stores, this location serves the local community with short-term collateral loans and a secondary retail marketplace for pre-owned goods. The store is open six days a week with extended weekday hours and limited Sunday hours, making it accessible for working adults who need financial services outside standard banking hours.

The store's core offering is the pawn loan: customers bring items of value, receive a cash loan based on the item's assessed worth, and can redeem their property by repaying the loan plus fees. EZPAWN also buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, offering appraisals for all karats and weights of precious metals. A notable specialty at this location is firearms — the store loans against rifles, shotguns, and handguns, stores them securely on-site, and also purchases collectible firearms outright. Auto loans are listed as a special category available at this location. For shoppers, EZPAWN sells thousands of pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers at discounts of 25% to 70% off new retail prices.

Several features distinguish EZPAWN from typical independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to earn points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions, and manage pawns and layaways online. An Instant Quote tool lets customers get an estimated value for electronics before visiting the store. Flexible purchase options include a layaway plan (10% down, monthly payments) and a Take Today program through third-party partners that allows customers to take items home and pay over up to 12 months based on credit eligibility. Product Protection Plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning) add an insurance-like layer to purchases.

For consumers in a cash crunch, EZPAWN provides a fast, no-credit-check path to short-term liquidity — the loan is secured by the item itself, so credit history is irrelevant. However, pawn loans carry fees and interest that can be costly relative to the loan amount, and borrowers who cannot repay forfeit their item. The store's 25–70% retail discount claims are typical pawn industry marketing and individual item pricing will vary. Auto loans are listed but details are not provided on the website, so terms and availability should be confirmed directly with the store.
address: 820 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221

company_info.headquarters: 820 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221

pros: No credit check required — pawn loans are collateral-based, accessible to those with poor or no credit
Firearms specialty: loans on rifles, shotguns, and handguns with secure on-site storage
EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers earn points and manage pawns and layaways online
Instant Quote tool provides electronic item estimates before visiting the store
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Take Today flexible payment option through third-party partners for up to 12+ months
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Sat) with Sunday availability
cons: Pawn loan fees and interest are not disclosed on the website — terms require an in-store visit
Auto loan details (rates, terms, eligibility) are absent from the website despite being listed as a service
Online payments not available in all states; this Las Vegas location's full digital capabilities are unclear
Redemption of pawned firearms requires a background check, adding a step most customers may not anticipate
Item appraisals and loan amounts for firearms are at sole discretion of the location with no posted guidelines
best_for: Consumers needing fast cash without a credit check who have electronics, jewelry, or firearms to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers looking for pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, or jewelry at 25–70% below retail
Firearm owners seeking collateral loans or outright sale of guns or collectibles
Unbanked or credit-challenged individuals who need short-term liquidity outside traditional lending
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for Las Vegas residents who need immediate cash against personal property — especially those with electronics, jewelry, or firearms — and who cannot or prefer not to use traditional credit products. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs (fees and interest) are not published online and can be high relative to loan size, so borrowers should request the full fee schedule before pledging any item.
services: EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management
Take Today flexible purchase financing (up to 12+ months via third-party)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
